/usr/bin/ar qc libinfrastructure.a CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/event/app_event.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/event/app_event_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/event/app_event_loop.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/event/app_event_router.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/bus/i2c_bus_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/repositories/data_repository.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/time/monotonic_scheduler.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/numeric/checked_math.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/numeric/interpolation.c.o CMakeFiles/infrastructure.dir/numeric/sensor_profile.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libinfrastructure.a
